title: Metals gains amid tightness in supplies
section_path: Metals gains amid tightness in supplies
section_path_text: Metals gains amid tightness in supplies
summary:
Main
Energy markets were a touch weaker as tensions in the Middle East eased slightly. Sentiment in the metals sector remains bullish amid supply constraints and a pickup in demand. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-04-10 131450.png | assets/2024-04-10_metals-gains-amid-tightness-in-supplies_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_8db960bdc275.png
Crude oil edged lower as traders assessed the geopolitical backdrop.
